sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69629" key="mw=sis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῶσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">μῶμαι</etym>) <sense id="n69629.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">searching</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">28</biblScope> </bibl>: as etym. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Μοῦσα</foreign>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
